# cortex-ia

> AI Agent Ecosystem Configurator — configures 8 AI coding agents with 5 MCP servers (70 tools), 19 SDD skills, and orchestrator prompts. One Go binary, interactive TUI, full backup/restore.

## What It Does

cortex-ia detects installed AI coding agents and configures them with a complete development ecosystem: persistent memory (Cortex, 31 tools), SDD contract validation (ForgeSpec, 19 tools), inter-agent messaging (Agent Mailbox, 14 tools), multi-CLI orchestration (CLI Orchestrator, 4 tools), and live documentation (Context7).

## Supported Agents (8)

- Claude Code — markdown sections, separate MCP JSON, task delegation
- OpenCode — file replace, merge into settings, sub-agents, slash commands
- Gemini CLI — file replace, merge into settings
- Cursor — file replace, MCP config file, native subagents
- VS Code Copilot — file replace, MCP config file, task delegation
- Codex — file replace, TOML config
- Windsurf — append to file, MCP config file
- Antigravity — append to file, MCP config file

## MCP Servers (5, 70 tools total)

### Cortex Memory (31 tools)
Core: mem_save, mem_search, mem_get_observation, mem_context, mem_session_summary, mem_update, mem_capture_passive, mem_save_prompt, mem_suggest_topic_key
Session: mem_session_start, mem_session_end, mem_stats, mem_delete
Knowledge graph: mem_relate, mem_graph, mem_score, mem_search_hybrid, mem_archive, mem_timeline, mem_revision_history, mem_merge_projects
Temporal (experimental): temporal_create_edge, temporal_get_edges, temporal_get_relevant, temporal_create_snapshot, temporal_record_operation, temporal_evaluate_quality, temporal_system_metrics, temporal_health_check, temporal_evolution_path, temporal_fact_state

### ForgeSpec (19 tools)
Contracts: sdd_validate, sdd_save, sdd_get, sdd_list, sdd_history, sdd_phases
Task board: tb_create_board, tb_add_task, tb_status, tb_claim, tb_update, tb_unblocked, tb_get, tb_delete_task, tb_add_notes, tb_list
File reservation: file_reserve, file_check, file_release

### Agent Mailbox (14 tools)
Messaging: msg_send, msg_read_inbox, msg_acknowledge, msg_broadcast, msg_search, msg_request, msg_list_threads, msg_get, msg_delete, msg_count, msg_update_status
Registry: agent_register, msg_list_agents, msg_activity_feed

### CLI Orchestrator (4 tools)
cli_execute, cli_route, cli_stats, cli_list

## SDD Pipeline (9 phases, 19 skills)

```
init → explore → propose → spec → design → tasks → apply → verify → archive
```

Pipeline skills: bootstrap, investigate, draft-proposal, write-specs, architect, decompose, team-lead, implement, validate, finalize
Utility skills: debug, ideate, debate, monitor, execute-plan, open-pr, file-issue, parallel-dispatch, scan-registry

### Multi Team-Lead Pattern
The orchestrator can launch multiple team-leads in parallel for independent task groups. Dependent team-leads wait via P2P messaging (msg_broadcast/msg_read_inbox) before executing. Each team-lead launches N @implement sub-agents in parallel within its group.

### Adaptive Pipeline
Escalation: confidence < 0.6 → add validate+finalize; 3+ spec violations → redesign cycle; 30% task failures → halt
De-escalation: all confidence > 0.9 → skip finalize retrospective
Checkpoint: every 4 tasks, save incremental progress for compaction recovery

## CLI Commands (17)

```
cortex-ia                    Interactive TUI
cortex-ia install            Install ecosystem (auto-detect agents)
cortex-ia install --agent claude-code --preset full
cortex-ia install --model-preset balanced|performance|economy
cortex-ia install --persona professional|mentor|minimal
cortex-ia install --local    Use project .cortex-ia.yaml config
cortex-ia install --dry-run
cortex-ia init               Create .cortex-ia.yaml in current dir
cortex-ia sync               Refresh managed files from current state
cortex-ia detect             Detect agents + runtime dependencies
cortex-ia config             Show current configuration
cortex-ia list agents|components|backups
cortex-ia skill add|list|remove  Manage community skills
cortex-ia auto-install       Install missing agents via package managers
cortex-ia doctor             Health checks (6 checks)
cortex-ia repair             Re-apply from lockfile/state
cortex-ia rollback           Restore from backup
cortex-ia update             Check for available updates
```

## Presets

- full: All 8 components (default)
- minimal: Cortex + ForgeSpec + Context7 + SDD (auto-pulls Mailbox)
- custom: User-selected via TUI

## Per-Phase Model Routing

3 presets: balanced (default), performance, economy
Maps SDD phases to Claude model tiers (opus/sonnet/haiku) for cost optimization.

## Persona System

- professional: Direct, concise, technical terminology (default)
- mentor: Teaching-oriented, explains trade-offs and patterns
- minimal: Code only, no explanations unless asked

## Architecture

- Go 1.22+ binary, Bubbletea TUI, embedded assets via go:embed
- Adapter pattern: each agent implements interface, components use adapters for paths/strategies
- 2-stage pipeline: Prepare (validate+backup) → Apply (components), with FailurePolicy
- Parallel execution: agents run concurrently via RunParallelChains
- Topological sort: Kahn's algorithm with ParallelGroups for dependency ordering
- Marker-based injection: <!-- cortex-ia:ID --> markers for idempotent section injection
- Atomic writes: temp file + rename pattern prevents partial writes
- Backup/restore: automatic snapshot before every install

## Project Config (.cortex-ia.yaml)

```yaml
preset: full
persona: professional
model-preset: balanced
agents:
  - claude-code
  - opencode
disabled-components:
  - mailbox
custom-skills:
  - path: ./skills/domain-validator
```

## Testing

- 175 test functions across 23 packages
- Pipeline coverage 98.9%, SDD coverage 93.8%
- E2E Docker tests: Ubuntu + Fedora (29 assertions)
- Health checks: files-exist, cortex-binary, node-npx, skills-present, convention-present, state-lock-consistent

## Prerequisites

- Go 1.22+ (building)
- Node.js 18+ with npx (MCP servers)
- Cortex binary (persistent memory)
- At least one supported agent installed

## Related Projects

- cortex: https://github.com/lleontor705/cortex (memory MCP, 31 tools)
- forgespec-mcp: https://github.com/lleontor705/forgespec-mcp (contracts + task board, 19 tools)
- agent-mailbox-mcp: https://github.com/lleontor705/agent-mailbox-mcp (messaging, 14 tools)
- cli-orchestrator-mcp: https://github.com/lleontor705/cli-orchestrator-mcp (multi-CLI routing, 4 tools)
